name: HelpHub Q4 AI direction
decision_question: Which single AI capability should HelpHub validate for enterprise support teams next quarter?
target_cohort: B2B support teams with 20+ agents and contractual SLAs
constraints: One product squad for eight weeks
No fully autonomous customer-facing response in the first experiment
Must preserve an auditable reason for every escalation
success_metric: Reduce severe SLA breaches without increasing false escalations above 15%
